title: Wei-Lun Kao
text: Home * People * Wei-Lun Kao Wei-Lun Kao [1] Wei-Lun Kao , a Taiwanese computer scientist, holding a M.Sc. degree from National Chiao Tung University in 2009 on automated tuning the evaluation function for Computer Chinese Chess [2] . As member of the Computer Games and Intelligence (CGI) laboratory headed by professor I-Chen Wu , he contributed as co-author of the Chinese Chess program Chimo [3] . Selected Publications [ edit ] Wei-Lun Kao ( 2009 ). The Automatically Tuning System of Evaluation Function for Computer Chinese Chess .
